title: Apple Tree ‘Scrumptious’ | Self-Fertile Bare Root Dessert Apple Tree | Sweet Red Eating Apples | Ideal for UK Gardens | Frost-Resistant Blossom - (M26) 12 Litre Pots x2 by Thompson & Morgan
features: Frost-resistant blossom for more reliable harvests
Fruit stays on the tree until picked
description: Apple ‘Scrumptious’ lives up to its name with a truly mouth-watering flavour. This modern British-bred variety produces sweet, crisp apples with a thin, bright red skin, perfect for eating fresh from the tree. The fruit holds well without dropping, giving you time to enjoy each apple at its best. It’s a fantastic choice for UK gardeners looking for a reliable and delicious dessert apple. Specially developed for garden growing, ‘Scrumptious’ is self-fertile, meaning no pollination partner is required—perfect if you only have room for one tree. The frost-resistant blossom increases the chance of a successful crop each year. With a little care, this compact tree will reward you with juicy apples from September that can be stored into October. How to Grow: Light: Plant in a sunny, sheltered location for best results. Temperature: Hardy throughout the UK; frost-resistant blossom helps ensure cropping. Watering: Water thoroughly during dry spells, especially when fruiting. Feeding: Apply compost or well-rotted manure in spring; use a balanced fruit tree fertiliser yearly. Humidity: Avoid overcrowding; maintain airflow to prevent disease. Images shown are for guidance only and show the expected results of plants upon maturity. Different growing conditions might vary results. Image may be included for illustration of supply but can vary due to seasonality changes (e.g. deciduous plants lose leaves in colder months). Decorative pots are not supplied.
